title: Legislative Decree No. 14 of 2023 Amending Law No. 16 of 2014 Regarding the Protection of State Information and Documents
summary: Updates the legal framework governing protected state information and documents, including provisions relevant to disclosure control and responsibility for protected information.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Amends Bahrain’s state information and documents protection law.

notes: Related instruments: Amends Law No. 16 of 2014
